creator: wh@helbig.informatik.ba-stuttgart.de
text:
The FAQ "3.13. What other devices does 2.X support?"
	says the ``nic'' driver is supported. This is not true
	anymore. In fact no ISDN-Cards are supported by FreeBSD 2.2
	and by FreeBSD-current. (which is very bad)

Fix: 

Change the FAQ or better yet support ISDN-Cards. This is
	very important in Germany and I suppose in Europe! Maybe the
	stuff from ftp.muc.ditec.de should be integrated in -current???
